meta.title: Legal Notes | Doctor Haus
meta.description: Legal documents, privacy policy, cookie policy and terms of use for Doctor Haus.

placeholder: Document under legal review. For any requests, contact us at info@doctor-haus.com.

sections.title: Data Controller
sections.content: The data controller is Montaggi Srl, with registered office at Via Mario Giuntini 95, 56121 Cascina (PI), Italy, VAT 02293340507. To exercise your rights you can write to info@doctor-haus.com.

sections.title: Data collected
sections.content: We collect personal data that you voluntarily provide through the contact form (name, email, phone, message) and technical browsing data (technical and analytics cookies).

sections.title: Purpose of processing
sections.content: Your data is processed for: responding to your information and quote requests; administrative and accounting purposes; compliance with legal obligations; sending marketing communications with your explicit consent.

sections.title: Legal basis
sections.content: Processing is based on your consent (Art. 6 para. 1(a) GDPR), performance of pre-contractual measures (Art. 6 para. 1(b) GDPR), and legal obligations (Art. 6 para. 1(c) GDPR).

sections.title: Data retention
sections.content: Data is retained for the time necessary for the indicated purposes and in any case no longer than 10 years from collection for administrative purposes, unless otherwise required by law.

sections.title: Your rights
sections.content: You have the right to: access your data, rectify it, delete it, restrict processing, object to processing, request portability, withdraw consent at any time.

sections.title: Data disclosure
sections.content: Your data may be disclosed to third parties (consultants, authorities) only for compliance with legal obligations or for the correct execution of the contractual relationship.

sections.title: Data transfer
sections.content: Data is not transferred outside the European Economic Area. Should this be necessary, appropriate safeguards under GDPR will be adopted.

sections.title: What are cookies
sections.content: Cookies are small text files that visited websites send to your browser, where they are stored to be retransmitted on subsequent visits.

sections.title: Technical cookies
sections.content: We use technical cookies necessary for the functioning of the site. They do not require your prior consent.

sections.title: Analytics cookies
sections.content: We use analytics tools to understand how visitors interact with the site. You can disable them in cookie preferences.

sections.title: Third-party cookies
sections.content: The site may incorporate third-party content (Google Maps, videos) that may set their own cookies. Consult the respective providers' policies.

sections.title: Cookie management
sections.content: You can manage your cookie preferences at any time via our Cookie Preferences Center or by changing your browser settings.
